decisions.label: Check box value and next button check

Flow.description: VMS Client Screen Flow to Create Job Order
Flow.interviewLabel: VMS Client > Community > Create Job Order {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: VMS Client > Community > Create Job Order

recordLookups.name: Get_Job_Roles_based_on_Sirenum_Links
recordLookups.label: Get Job Roles based on Sirenum Links

fields.name: Job_Error_Screen_msg
fields.fieldText:
⚠️

It looks like you haven’t selected a working pattern yet.

Please choose the days and times you need staff before continuing.

fields.name: Display1
fields.fieldText:
Job Order Created Successfully


{!NewJobOrderName}

fields.name: Holder1
fields.fieldText:
Job Information

____________________

fields.name: Holder2
fields.fieldText:
Duration & Reason

____________________

fields.name: Do_you_want_any_Specific_Worker
fields.fieldText: If you would like to request a worker who has previously performed this role at this site, please tick this box. You will be able to select them on the next screen.

fields.name: holder5
fields.fieldText:
Week 1 - Working Patten

____________________

fields.name: Holder3
fields.fieldText: If the booking requires staff to work on a 14 day rota, add week 2 below. For more complex shift patterns, please contact your Blue Arrow representative.

fields.name: Holder4
fields.fieldText:
Week 2 - Working Patten

____________________

fields.name: SpecificWorkernotfound
fields.fieldText:
ℹ️ No workers found

We couldn't find any specific workers which match the site and job role. Please continue and click 'Create Job' below

fields.name: Specific_Worker
fields.fieldText: Select a previous worker from the drop down below:

fields.name: DisplayText
fields.fieldText: ℹ️Blue Arrow will place this worker if they are available or we will fill the requirment with another suitable worker.
